title: NCC-PT - National Coordination Centre (CNCS)
summary: Page of the Portuguese National Cybersecurity Centre's National Coordination Centre (NCC-PT) listing funded actions, including security evaluations of Post-Quantum Cryptography (PQC) primitives and security of PQC algorithm implementations.

title: Call for Presentations - C-DAYS 2026 (CNCS)
summary: Call for presentations for the Portuguese National Cybersecurity Centre's C-DAYS 2026 conference, listing Post-Quantum Cryptography among the priority thematic topics.

title: Emerging Technologies Report 2023 (CNCS Observatory)
summary: Report from the Portuguese National Cybersecurity Centre's Observatory on emerging technologies in cybersecurity. The candidate snippet does not explicitly confirm a post-quantum cryptography reference, so this is flagged for human review.

title: ROSE - CNCS R&D Document
summary: Research and development document published by the Portuguese National Cybersecurity Centre. The candidate snippet describes the general cybersecurity landscape and does not explicitly confirm a post-quantum cryptography reference, so this is flagged for human review.
